SEARCH
Package minicp.engine.core

Class IntVarImpl

java.lang.Object
minicp.engine.core.IntVarImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
IntVar
Direct Known Subclasses:
BoolVarIsEqual
public class IntVarImpl extends Object implements IntVar
Implementation of a variable with a SparseSetDomain.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    IntVarImpl(Solver cp, int n)
    Creates a variable with the elements {0,...,n-1} as initial domain.
    IntVarImpl(Solver cp, int min, int max)
    Creates a variable with the elements {min,...,max} as initial domain.
    IntVarImpl(Solver cp, Set<Integer> values)
    Creates a variable with a given set of values as initial domain.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    contains(int v)
    Returns true if the domain contains the specified value.
    int
    fillArray(int[] dest)
    Copies the values of the domain into an array.

    Fix the specified value

    Returns the solver in which this variable was created.
    boolean
    isFixed()
    Returns true if the domain of the variable has a single value.

    Returns the maximum of the domain of the variable
    int
    min()
    Returns the minimum of the domain of the variable
    void
    propagateOnBoundChange(Constraint c)
    Asks that Constraint.propagate() is called whenever the bound (maximum or minimum values) of the domain of this variable is changes.
    void
    propagateOnDomainChange(Constraint c)
    Asks that Constraint.propagate() is called whenever the domain of this variable changes.
    void
    propagateOnFix(Constraint c)
    Asks that Constraint.propagate() is called whenever the domain of this variable is reduced to a singleton.

    Removes the specified value.

    Remove all the values above a given value

    Remove all the values less than a given value

    scheduleAll(StateStack<Constraint> constraints)
     
    int

    Returns the size of the domain of the variable
    String
    toString()
     
    void
    whenBoundChange(Procedure f)
    Asks that the closure is called whenever the max or min setValue of the domain of this variable changes
    void
    whenDomainChange(Procedure f)
    Asks that the closure is called whenever the domain change of this variable changes
    void
    whenFixed(Procedure f)
    Asks that the closure is called whenever the domain of this variable is reduced to a single setValue

  • Constructor Details

    • IntVarImpl

      public IntVarImpl(Solver cp, int n)
      Creates a variable with the elements {0,...,n-1} as initial domain.
      Parameters:
      cp - the solver in which the variable is created
      n - the number of values with n > 0

    • IntVarImpl

      public IntVarImpl(Solver cp, int min, int max)
      Creates a variable with the elements {min,...,max} as initial domain.
      Parameters:
      cp - the solver in which the variable is created
      min - the minimum value of the domain
      max - the maximum value of the domain with max >= min

    • IntVarImpl

      public IntVarImpl(Solver cp, Set<Integer> values)
      Creates a variable with a given set of values as initial domain.
      Parameters:
      cp - the solver in which the variable is created
      values - the initial values in the domain, it must be nonempty

  • Method Details

    • getSolver

      public Solver getSolver()
      Description copied from interface: IntVar
      Returns the solver in which this variable was created.
      Specified by:
      getSolver in interface IntVar
      Returns:
      the solver in which this variable was created

    • isFixed

      public boolean isFixed()
      Description copied from interface: IntVar
      Returns true if the domain of the variable has a single value.
      Specified by:
      isFixed in interface IntVar
      Returns:
      true if the domain of the variable is a singleton.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object

    • whenFixed

      public void whenFixed(Procedure f)
      Description copied from interface: IntVar
      Asks that the closure is called whenever the domain of this variable is reduced to a single setValue
      Specified by:
      whenFixed in interface IntVar
      Parameters:
      f - the closure

    • whenBoundChange

      public void whenBoundChange(Procedure f)
      Description copied from interface: IntVar
      Asks that the closure is called whenever the max or min setValue of the domain of this variable changes
      Specified by:
      whenBoundChange in interface IntVar
      Parameters:
      f - the closure

    • whenDomainChange

      public void whenDomainChange(Procedure f)
      Description copied from interface: IntVar
      Asks that the closure is called whenever the domain change of this variable changes
      Specified by:
      whenDomainChange in interface IntVar
      Parameters:
      f - the closure

    • propagateOnDomainChange

      public void propagateOnDomainChange(Constraint c)
      Description copied from interface: IntVar
      Asks that Constraint.propagate() is called whenever the domain of this variable changes. We say that a change event occurs.
      Specified by:
      propagateOnDomainChange in interface IntVar
      Parameters:
      c - the constraint for which the Constraint.propagate() method should be called on change events of this variable.

    • propagateOnFix

      public void propagateOnFix(Constraint c)
      Description copied from interface: IntVar
      Asks that Constraint.propagate() is called whenever the domain of this variable is reduced to a singleton. In such a state the variable is fixed and we say that a fix event occurs.
      Specified by:
      propagateOnFix in interface IntVar
      Parameters:
      c - the constraint for which the Constraint.propagate() method should be called on fix events of this variable.

    • propagateOnBoundChange

      public void propagateOnBoundChange(Constraint c)
      Description copied from interface: IntVar
      Asks that Constraint.propagate() is called whenever the bound (maximum or minimum values) of the domain of this variable is changes. We say that a bound change event occurs in this case.
      Specified by:
      propagateOnBoundChange in interface IntVar
      Parameters:
      c - the constraint for which the Constraint.propagate() method should be called on bound change events of this variable.

    • scheduleAll

      protected void scheduleAll(StateStack<Constraint> constraints)

      Description copied from interface: IntVar
      Returns the minimum of the domain of the variable

      Returns:
      the minimum of the domain of the variable

      Returns the maximum of the domain of the variable

      public int size()
      Description copied from interface: IntVar
      Returns the size of the domain of the variable
      Specified by:
      size in interface IntVar
      Returns:
      the size of the domain of the variable

    • fillArray

      public int fillArray(int[] dest)
      Description copied from interface: IntVar
      Copies the values of the domain into an array.
      Specified by:
      fillArray in interface IntVar
      Parameters:
      dest - an array large enough dest.length >= size()
      Returns:
      the size of the domain and dest[0,...,size-1] contains the values in the domain in an arbitrary order

    • contains

      public boolean contains(int v)
      Description copied from interface: IntVar
      Returns true if the domain contains the specified value.
      Specified by:
      contains in interface IntVar
      Parameters:
      v - the value whose presence in the domain is to be tested
      Returns:
      true if the domain contains the specified value

    • remove

      public void remove(int v)
      Description copied from interface: IntVar
      Removes the specified value.
      Specified by:
      remove in interface IntVar
      Parameters:
      v - the value to remove

    • fix

      public void fix(int v)
      Description copied from interface: IntVar
      Fix the specified value
      Specified by:
      fix in interface IntVar
      Parameters:
      v - the value to fix.

    • removeBelow

      public void removeBelow(int v)
      Description copied from interface: IntVar
      Remove all the values less than a given value
      Specified by:
      removeBelow in interface IntVar
      Parameters:
      v - the value such that all the values less than v are removed

    • removeAbove

      public void removeAbove(int v)
      Description copied from interface: IntVar
      Remove all the values above a given value
      Specified by:
      removeAbove in interface IntVar
      Parameters:
      v - the value such that all the values larger than v are removed
